title: CobbleMerchant++
description: A simple addon for CobbleDollars that adds shops to buy something.
body:
#  Introduction
Adds purchasable items to shops,
including Pokémon fossils, type gems,
Tera Shards (from Mega Showdown)
and special items from Cobblemon Utility+ and WantedItems.

#  How to Unlock Shops
Simply throw a relic coin sack at a CobbleDollars cobble merchant to unlock the new shop items.
